title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BETON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 317 / 55 OG No. 18, 3265 (May 4, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2115, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BETON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Island of Icaduang Banua in the Municipality of Taytay, Province of Palawan, is constituted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Beton.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
